creator: nvass@gmx.com
text:
If I am not mistaken, that was always the case for gjournal. And it was ok because you usually don't manually stop the journal.

You can workaround the problem by setting sysctl kern.geom.label.ufsid.enable to 0 so it won't get tasted it.

You can also use -h when doing "gjournal label" to hardcode provider names in metadata.
